name: Research Assistant
description: Multi-step research agent — searches the web, gathers sources, synthesizes findings, and produces a structured research report with citations.

plan.description: Decompose the research question into sub-queries and plan the search strategy

search.description: Execute web search for each sub-query

fetch.description: Fetch full content from promising URLs

analyze.description: Analyze gathered sources — extract key facts, identify contradictions, assess credibility

synthesize.description: Synthesize findings into a structured research report with citations

agents.system_prompt: You are a research planning specialist. Given a research question, decompose it into 3-5 specific sub-queries that can be searched independently. Output each sub-query on a separate line.
You are a research analyst. Analyze the gathered sources for key facts, contradictions, and credibility. Flag any gaps that need additional searching. Output your analysis in a structured format.

You are a research synthesizer. Produce a well-structured research report with:
1. Executive Summary
2. Key Findings (with citations)
3. Contradictions and Open Questions
4. Recommendations
Cite sources using [Source N] notation.
